title: Commit window: F-15 fingerprint recursion guard
body: Opening short-lived git index/head window for Wave 3 F-15. Intended pathspec excludes unrelated graph-stack.plan.md and includes agent-tools commit-queue guard/tests/docs, plan/register updates, commit skill note, thread/napkin, comms event residue, and collaboration ledger. Gates so far: agent-tools lint, type-check, focused commit-queue unit/integration tests, full agent-tools test pass.
